programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The co-pilot of a plane carrying Dr Sloan to a conference is murdered by persons unknown mid-flight, and the remainder of the crew members find themselves struck down by a mystery illness. Medical detective drama, starring Dick Van Dyke(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: An adulterous woman kills her wealthy husband, and then tries to convince the authorities his death was caused by a medical condition, implicating Dr Sloan in the process. Drama, starring Dick Van Dyke(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: The wife of a comedian is killed, but evidence suggests her partner may have been the intended target. Detective drama, starring Dick Van Dyke, Barry Van Dyke and Victoria Rowell(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A vengeful convict is released on a technicality and tries to make good on his threat to kill Dr Sloan, while Norman strenuously opposes plans to sell the hospital to an unscrupulous businessman. Medical detective drama, starring Dick Van Dyke(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A councillor's wife is found dead in suspicious circumstances and all the evidence points to her husband - but Steve believes the man is being framed by corrupt policemen. Medical detective drama, starring Dick Van Dyke(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An internal security breach forces NCIS to go into lockdown when a covert listening device is found in a pen belonging to Secretary of the Navy Sarah Porter. DiNozzo discovers that National Security Agency analyst Ellie Bishop wrote a report two years previously predicting the possibility of such an occurrence and she is brought in to assist with the investigation and track down the culprit. Guest starring Leslie Hope and Emily Wickersham(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is called in to investigate when marine corporal Flegman is found shot to death, and a phone leads them to a hotel room where Gibbs awkwardly stumbles upon his ex-wife Diane Sterling and her FBI agent ex-husband TC Fornell. She had been attempting to call her boyfriend Eddie to break up with him, but somehow Flegman had taken possession of his phone. The team tracks down Eddie's car and discovers a clown nose along with traces of blood and he quickly becomes the prime suspect(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team investigates when a mysterious, fast-spreading illness strikes children from military families. While Gibbs tries to determine the cause, Abby and Jimmy partner with the Naval Medical Research Centre in the hope of delivering a cure before the holidays. Mark Harmon stars(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A petty officer is killed by a stolen surveillance drone and the team links it to elusive terrorist Benham Parsa. NCIS joins forces with the Department of Defence to track down the device before it is used for a large-scale attack, but Gibbs is less than pleased that he has to work with his ex-lover Hollis Mann. Meanwhile, McGee hopes he will be granted time off to attend a black-tie gala honouring his girlfriend Delilah. Guest starring Susanna Thompson (Arrow)(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: In an effort to find the terrorist Parsa, Gibbs and the NCIS team track down one of his cohorts using evidence gleaned from the drone attack which has killed six people and wounded a further 22. Meanwhile, an emotionally shaken McGee struggles with the ramifications of the incident. Drama, starring Mark Harmon, Sean Murray, David McCallum and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mystery
programme.desc: Real-life crimes and mysteries. Erin Moriarty investigates the case of a daughter who wants to try and convict her father's killer(n)

programme.title: 48 Hours: Mystery
programme.desc: Two doctors and a plot to kill - the man who posed as a hired hit man speaks out for the first time to correspondent Peter Van Sant(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella investigate the fatal shooting of a mounted police officer - but the only evidence is a bullet lodged in his horse, presenting them with a dilemma. Aiden takes on the case of a dead youth discovered with severe facial burns, and soon finds herself trying to crack an illegal betting operation(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella investigate a sleepwalker accused of killing a woman whose body she was found beside - but the blood on her clothing and splinters in her hands are not necessarily proof of guilt. Meanwhile, Danny and Aiden look into the death of a professional pickpocket whose apartment reveals the extent of his activities. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Melina Kanakaredes and Carmine Giovinazzo(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Stella trail a killer around Brooklyn while investigating the murder of a man whose body was dumped on a subway track. Their only lead is a woman seen in a home movie in the victim's flat. Danny looks into the death of a gallery owner with links to the Mob, and the corpse of a building labourer with a foul-smelling wound poses problems for Aiden and Flack. Guest starring Kelly Hu(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac and Aiden investigate the death of a dog trainer killed with a knitting needle - but while their evidence points to a vet with a serious gambling habit, other circumstances could prove him innocent. Stella and Danny look into the stabbing of a courier, which seems bizarrely linked to a child sex offender convicted seven years previously. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A murder inquiry puts Mac and Stella on the trail of a dangerous gang that kills for sport. Meanwhile, Danny and Aiden investigate the death of a woman who worked at an illegal massage parlour. Crime drama, starring Gary Sinise, Melina Kanakaredes and Carmine Giovinazzo(n)

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: Red Troop is on standby following news that a senior member of al-Qaeda is in the UK, and its members' worst fears are confirmed when terrorists seize the Italian Consulate in London, demanding the immediate release of all prisoners held in Guantanamo Bay. The Army take over after police fail to storm the building, and the ensuing battle leaves Henno face to face with a zealot willing to die for his beliefs. Military drama, starring Ross Kemp(n)

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When the Doyle gang escapes while being transferred to a prison in Virginia City, Jamie and three others are taken hostage(n)

programme.title: The High Chaparral
programme.desc: Victoria returns to her father after a spat with Big John interrupting her father's time with the visiting Countess Maria. Manolito competes for her time while she gives Victoria sage advise on relationships as Big John returns for her. Linda Cristal stars(n)

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Rollin leads a difficult mission when the IMF team are ordered to persuade an unwilling enemy scientist, who has developed an advanced anti-ballistic system, to defect to the West. Martin Landau stars(n)

programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Tomorrow's World
programme.desc: Hosts present their views and opinions on the Bible's answers to the most important questions(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A middle-aged man murders his teenage girlfriend to ensure she does not tell her family about their affair. Dr Sloan is not fooled by his alibi and sets out to uncover the truth. Guest starring Robert Stack (Airplane!)(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: An environmental campaigner is suspected of starting a Bush fire to prevent developers building a new estate in the tranquil Malibu Hills - until he becomes a victim of the flames himself(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: An heiress is stabbed by a stalker, but the most likely suspect is found dead - and the case is complicated when an X-ray of the victim reveals surprising results. Medical whodunit, starring Dick Van Dyke and Victoria Rowell(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr Sloan is forced to step in and defend Jesse against accusations that he accidentally caused the death of a basketball player. Medical detective drama, starring Dick Van Dyke(n)

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr Sloan investigates the case of an actress who died of an infection seemingly contracted during routine cosmetic surgery at a clinic. Medical detective drama, starring Dick Van Dyke(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A Navy reservist is found dead in his home with marks around his neck, and Gibbs and the team discover he was working on a highly classified case for the department of defence. The circumstances surrounding the man's demise lead the investigators to suspect someone was secretly trying to drive him insane, bringing them into contact with Samantha Ryan, the director of a division specialising in psychological warfare. Guest starring Jamie Lee Curtis(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Chief petty officer Leland Wiley dies of a heart attack just as he is about to reveal information on elusive arms dealer Agah Bayar. The team discovers the cardiac arrest was caused by someone hacking into a computer monitoring Wiley's pacemaker and increasing his heart rate to 400bpm. Meanwhile, a probationary agent tries to impress Gibbs and win a place on his team. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, with Tamer Hassan and Matt L Jones(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Confidential files are leaked by an anonymous hacker, who threatens to release more unless the Navy agrees to renew a contract with a struggling shipbuilding firm. The Navy Secretary suspects the company's owner Philip Wickes is to blame, and asks NCIS to join forces with the PsyOps unit in an elaborate ruse to bring the culprit out of hiding. Meanwhile, Gibbs' colleagues begin to notice his attraction to his opposite number Samantha Ryan. Guest starring Jamie Lee Curtis(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Vance's brother-in-law Michael Thomas is linked to the murder of a petty officer, and Gibbs is placed under pressure to clear the man's name. Meanwhile, a negative performance review leaves Tony feeling downhearted and he resolves to prove the assessment wrong by being less chatty while on duty. Crime drama, starring Mark Harmon and Rocky Carroll(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A marine lieutenant's body falls from the sky and the team links the man's death to the disappearance of a Navy chaplain thought to have been kidnapped by rebels working with Colombian crime cartels. Ziva and Tony are dispatched to conduct a rescue operation and enlist the help of former Interpol agent Monique Lisson, while Gibbs discovers there was more to the chaplain's outreach mission than meets the eye. Crime drama, guest starring Karina Lombard (The L Word) and Jamie Lee Curtis (A Fish Called Wanda)(n)

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: Islamic terrorists take over a hospital where an Israeli minister is undergoing a heart operation. Fortunately, Harm is one of the patients, and takes swift action to defeat them. Drama, starring David James Elliott(n)

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: A Russian captain, trying to settle an old score during a war games exercise, turns his ship's guns on his former Cold War enemy, putting Harm, Mac and Bud in grave danger. Drama, starring David James Elliot(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: An enigmatic killer shoots dead a businessman spending Thanksgiving at a hotel in the city, then takes his glasses, jewellery and ID to Washington Dulles airport, which has been brought to a stand-still by a massive snowstorm. As the murderer's actions take effect, a terror alert is issued, leaving all northern US airports in a state of panic, and leaving it up to DiNozzo, Bishop and her husband - all of whom are trapped at Dulles by the weather - to bring the armed villain to justice. Crime drama, starring Michael Weatherley(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: McGee deals with his father's recent death by writing him a letter outlining the details of his latest investigation. The case involved tracking down a hactivist collective known as Krampus, who were thought to have been responsible for an incident in which the internet crashed all over Washington, DC. McGee and Abby brought in three known cyber-terrorists for questioning, and discover evidence that links the trio to an attempted breach of the Congress e-mail server and archive. However, when this line of inquiry reaches a dead-end, the team picks up a new lead that suggests an isolated hacker from Wisconsin may be responsible. This 'lone wolf' scenario does not seem plausible to McGee, though, as he recalls a lesson his late father taught him. Crime drama, starring Sean Murray(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The bodies of five people, all of whom are identified as being from the US Navy, are found on the floor of a diner, and all are connected to a suspicious tax firm that specialises in helping people who are in arrears. When further killings are linked to the business, the team realises the crime seem to be copycats of previous cases. Meanwhile, two of Gibbs' ex-wives appear at the location with something important to discuss with the agent. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: American social worker Sarah Goode is taken hostage by militants in northern Syria, and thanks to the efforts of the Navy Seals, is eventually returned home unharmed. Evidence from the incident suggests US citizen Kyle Nasry was connected to the kidnapping, but when the agents trace Nasry to a rally held by a controversial imam, they are surprised to find Sarah among the attendees. Meanwhile, DiNozzo finally takes his relationship with Zoe Keates public - surprising none of his colleagues. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and his colleagues investigate when Eric Kutzler, the first openly gay Navy lieutenant tipped to receive the Medal of Honour, is murdered. While the agents initially suspect Kutzler's death was the result of a hate crime, the fact that his police officer husband waited 20 minutes to report the crime suggests he had something to hide. Meanwhile, the team throws a baby shower for Palmer as his wife's due date approaches. Starring Mark Harmon, Michael Weatherly and Pauley Perrette(n)

programme.title: Ultimate Force
programme.desc: The SAS venture into lawless Chechnya to hunt down rebel hostage-takers. The mission takes an unexpected turn when insurgents capture civilians along with members of Blue Troop, leaving Henno and his team to stage a dramatic rescue bid. Military drama, starring Ross Kemp, Heather Peace and Chris Fox(n)

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Gambler Luke Calhoun and his daughter cause chaos when they arrive in the Ponderosa after he loses all his money in a stock scheme(n)

programme.title: The High Chaparral
programme.desc: An army deserter makes himself unwelcome on the ranch by tricking Buck into buying a camel, cheating at poker and trying to steal Mano's girl. Frank Gorshin guest stars(n)

programme.desc: The IMF team attend a crime czar's private party in an attempt to foil a gangster's plan to arrange the deaths of four government officials(n)

programme.desc: Part two of two. Mark recalls an incident from 20 years previously that appears to hold the key to solving the case involving cover-ups, radioactive fuel and the death of an airline rep. Medical detective drama, starring Dick Van Dyke(n)

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger

programme.desc: The death of a loved one fills Horatio and Delko with renewed determination to smash the Mala Noche gang once and for all - but FBI agents seize the lab before they can achieve results. As events unfold, the unmasking of a mole in the CSI unit leaves everyone reeling. Drama, guest starring Eric Mabius alongside David Caruso, Emily Procter and Adam Rodriguez(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A fire crew discovers a man's body after putting out a raging blaze at a warehouse belonging to a Navy-contracted electronics company, and Gibbs recognises the victim as Carter Plimpton - a former member of an NCIS black-ops unit. Meanwhile, a member of the Baltimore police department helping with the case appears to have a grudge against Tony(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs and his colleagues investigate when Eric Kutzler, the first openly gay Navy lieutenant tipped to receive the Medal of Honour, is murdered. programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: When a university professor accused of plagiarism is found dead, Perry defends his estranged wife who is charged with murder.(n)

With Chris O'Donnell, Louise Lombard and LL Cool J(n)

programme.desc: Walker investigates a spate of robberies and encounters a friend's husband in a halfway house for paroled convicts. Chuck Norris stars(n)

Meanwhile, Danny and Flack try to solve the riddle of a pool of blood in an apartment building - and a blocked rubbish chute may provide the answer(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: DiNozzo investigates a murder at the military academy he once attended, after a murdered marine and alumni of the school is found clutching a photo of a current student. Drama, starring John Denver, Jane Kaczmarek and Kurtwood Smith(n)

programme.title: The Homecoming: A Christmas Story (1971)
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, the Waltons are preparing to celebrate Christmas, but patriarch John Walton still has not returned home. Drama, starring Patricia Neal and Richard Thomas(n)

programme.desc: Horatio and Tripp investigate the murder of a man found bludgeoned to death the morning after he attended a speed-dating night for Miami singles at South Beach's Neuron Lounge. The victim's car was also vandalised with acetone, leading Calleigh to suspect the culprit was someone carrying nail polish remover(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team is called in when the corpses of six fishermen are found tied together in the ocean - with one missing a chunk of flesh from his leg. Initial findings point to modern-day pirates and possible cannibalism and the rescue of two survivors from the same boat soon gives weight to this theory - but then Horatio discovers the ship was involved in the transport of illegal arms(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A burglar falls from a third-floor balcony and lands on a passer-by, killing him in the process, and when the injured thief is tracked down, he is found to have footage of a judge in a compromising position. While Horatio tries to prove the robbery was arranged to prevent a blackmail attempt, Ryan and Tyler search for the woman on the recording - and find she may have met with foul play(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A woman is killed in a carjacking incident, but Horatio becomes convinced the seemingly random crime is actually a premeditated murder. Digging into the victim's personal life and her husband's business affairs, he unearths several well-concealed secrets. Meanwhile, Alexx discovers Dr Monroe is drinking heavily - and declares her intention to turn him in. Holly Valance guest stars(n)

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the team try to find the gang members responsible for a shoot-out in a hospital emergency room. programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Tracey spreads her wings for the first time since her husband was put behind bars, and invites a handsome footballer round for dinner. Meanwhile, Sharon discovers the joys of literature. Comedy, starring Pauline Quirke, Linda Robson and Lesley Joseph(n)

programme.title: Birds of a Feather
programme.desc: Christmas special from 1989. The Essex girls steel themselves for a lonely Christmas away from their jailbird husbands. Pauline Quirke and Linda Robson star(n)

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: The roguish antiques dealer is arrested on suspicion of armed robbery - and to make matters worse, the only way he can clear his name is by admitting he was with a charming ex-girlfriend at the time. He must decide whether to come clean and face a jealous Charlotte's wrath, or take the consequences of the charge. Ian McShane stars(n)

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: A penniless sculptor seeks the canny dealer's help to prise a considerable inheritance out of his avaricious brother. Celia Imrie guest stars, with Ian McShane(n)

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: The police suspect Lovejoy of stealing from one of Jane's old friends, forcing him to enlist the help of refuse collector extraordinaire Brian Nun to clear himself. Unfortunately, matters are complicated by Eric's 'bin diving' habit. Light-hearted drama, starring Ian McShane and Phyllis Logan(n)

programme.title: Lovejoy
programme.desc: Two mysterious murders appear to be the work of an ancient Mayan curse attached to a statue acquired by Lovejoy. Drama, starring Ian McShane and Phyllis Logan(n)

programme.title: The Wind in the Willows
programme.desc: Lavish live-action adaptation of Kenneth Grahame's much-loved children's novel. Matt Lucas stars as Toad, the aristocratic amphibian with a love of fast cars, with Bob Hoskins, Mark Gatiss and Lee Ingleby as his best friends Badger, Rat and Mole, who 'poop-poop' his new hobby when they realise he is becoming a menace to other road-users. However, Mr Toad ignores them, runs away and steals a motor car - for which he gets thrown into prison for 20 years. With no one to look after his stately manor house, the place is overrun with stoats and weasels(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Christmas special of the period drama, which catches up with the nurses and midwives of Nonnatus House in 1962. They receive a letter from a doctor running a mission clinic on the Eastern Cape of South Africa, who is in desperate need of their help to save her urgently needed hospital from closure. The nurses head to Africa to lend a hand, finding the clinic understaffed, underfunded and with a poor water supply, but overwhelmed with patients who need their help more than anyone ever has before. Sinead Cusack guest stars(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The nuns and midwives return home after their trip to South Africa, to find Nonnatus House has come under new management. The formidable Sister Ursula (Harriet Walter) has taken charge and introduced some drastic changes to the way the clinic is run, which Sister Julienne, bound by her vow of obedience, is powerless to oppose. The midwives come to the aid of a victim of domestic violence whose husband is about to be released from prison, and who risks losing everything if she seeks a divorce. Sister Mary Cynthia suffers further anxiety attacks, and Patsy receives distressing news about her father(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Ursula insists the midwives do not become emotionally involved with their patients, but her harsh new approach proves hard to cope with in the face of two devastating cases. A father-to-be is badly injured in an explosion, leaving him unable to work to support his family, and a couple with dwarfism expecting their first child are warned that their child may be stillborn, a situation that leaves Patsy confronted with one of the hardest decisions of her life(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: The government plans to close down small hospitals in favour of larger establishments. Dr Turner and Shelagh prepare for an inspection that will decide the fate of Nonnatus House - but the staff is shocked to find Sister Ursula has no intention of helping to save the maternity home. Barbara comes to the aid of a woman from the Chinese community who is struggling to get on with her mother-in-law, and whose baby is seriously ill(n)

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest and his friends find themselves stranded with a group of hedonists and are desperate to escape, fearful that their lives are in danger. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams as a Roman Catholic priest who attempts to solve various misdemeanours(n)

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A student backpacker is found dead in the showers of her hostel, and with a gun in her hand and her body slumped against the only door, all evidence points toward suicide. Humphrey isn't so sure, however, especially when he notices all her toiletries laid out and her towel missing. But when the team question the victim's boyfriend and her fellow backpackers, they find themselves with very little to go on. Meanwhile, JP prepares for the biggest day of his life as his wedding day approaches, and when Humphrey bumps into an old lady friend, Florence encourages her boss to pursue his quest for love(n)

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. The body of 20 year-old Lorna Katz is discovered drifting in the River Lea, with evidence suggesting she was tied up somewhere before she floated downstream. However, the death takes on an ever-more sinister significance when the team discovers that Lorna was the best friend of Ruth Tresize, a teenager who disappeared three years previously, with the missing girl's mother Ali becoming fixated on Nikki for information, convinced that the two incidents are connected(n)

programme.title: The White Princess
programme.desc: The pretender exposes King Henry's weaknesses, while Lizzie confronts new demons and old curses. Concluding the sequel to The White Queen, set in the Middle Ages as the War of the Roses comes to an end. Jodie Comer, Jacob Collins-Levy, Suki Waterhouse and Michelle Fairley star(n)

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: The team investigates an arson attack on a 1980s music station that resulted in the death of a controversial DJ, and looks into the subsequent suicide of the station's owner. Strickland seeks a permanent replacement for the absent Halford, but Pullman and Standing call his bluff(n)

programme.title: The Heart Guy
programme.desc: Hugh's world is turned upside down after Harriet gives birth to their baby, while Meryl and Ajax clash over his plans for a cemetery on the family farm(n)

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Terry tracks down the paedophile who abused him as a child and, enraged by the old man's lack of remorse, resorts to physical violence. Yvonne tries to stop pregnant teenager Shirley selling her baby, but her well-meaning intervention has unexpected and potentially tragic consequences. Debbie learns her nanny has been hiding a shocking secret and Phil consoles Samantha, who is now convinced her missing daughter Abi has been abducted(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Ramani fears Terry has taken the law into his own hands when both he and Malcolm Willard go missing, but it seems the aged paedophile has more to fear from Terry's brother Ben, who is also looking for revenge. Irene Radford issues dire threats after her son Wayne is found dead in his cell, apparently from an overdose, while Neil reprimands Andrea for breaking regulations - only to end up in a passionate embrace with her(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Things look grim for Adam as the day of his trial dawns, until Andrea and Neil manage to expose Jerome Taylor's dirty dealings, while investigations into the death of paedophile Malcolm Willard raise the alarming possibility that a serial sniper could be on the loose in Sun Hill. An angry exchange with Shirley adds to Yvonne's woes as she anxiously awaits the results of her HIV tests(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Jack questions the wisdom of Adam's decision to alert the officers to the presence of a serial sniper on the streets of Sun Hill, while undercover journalist Andrea debates whether to cave in to pressure from her editor and deliver a sensationalistic story that could terrify the local population. Steve is unimpressed with Lance's handling of a hostage situation and resorts to extreme measures to express his displeasure(n)

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Laura and Rosemary are hired to re-create a Victorian garden in Regent's Park, where they meet all manner of intriguing characters - but the oasis of calm in central London is shattered by the discovery of a body. The victim is a respected Harley Street psychiatrist - whose three-legged dog appears to hold the key to solving the case. Mystery drama, starring Felicity Kendal and Pam Ferris(n)

programme.title: Annie (1982)
programme.desc: An orphan wins the fatherly affections of a tough-talking billionaire - but the no-good owner of the orphanage and her brother are out to ruin the girl's chances of happiness and make a quick profit in the process. Musical, directed by John Huston, based on the stage play. Starring Aileen Quinn, Albert Finney, Carol Burnett and Tim Curry(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A woman expecting her third child realises she cannot afford to care for her baby, so makes the painful decision to give it away to her wealthy but childless cousin. Shelagh befriends the woman in the next hospital bed and Dr Turner confides in Timothy about his worst fears. Sister Julienne looks for a new recruit to join the midwives, and the community prepares to celebrate the opening of a new park(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: A distant cousin of Fred's who has Down's syndrome is taken in by the Buckles following the death of his protective mother, but Violet struggles to cope and Shelagh is forced to make other arrangements for his care. New recruit Valerie prepares for her first day at Nonnatus House, and Trixie comes to the aid of a pregnant woman who is in urgent need of dental treatment to avoid an infection. The nurses discover what has happened to Sister Mary Cynthia, a revelation that has distressing consequences for Sister Monica Joan(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: While the world anxiously awaits the resolution of the Cuban Missile Crisis, Valerie treats a pregnant Somali woman who has undergone female genital circumcision. The Nonnatus Team arrange for her to go into hospital, but she responds by going into hiding, and the situation is complicated further when it emerges that the woman's younger sister will soon go through the same process. Sister Mary Cynthia's depression is treated with electroconvulsive therapy, which she hopes will restore her faith(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Dr Turner is reunited with a couple whose daughter was born without limbs, and takes them to a specialist unit where she can be fitted for prosthetics. However, while the experience helps the girl's mother to realise that she is not alone, it proves traumatic for the father, who blames his wife for his child's condition. Nurse Crane takes charge of Sister Winifred's driving lessons, and Trixie thinks Christopher is hiding something from her(n)

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A body is discovered in a vineyard and Father Brown is tasked with searching for the murderer among a group of suspects who are all seeking to reinvent themselves. Fifties-set crime drama based on the stories by GK Chesterton, starring Mark Williams and Sorcha Cusack(n)

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A scientist studying a live volcano is found dead halfway up the mountain, and the evidence points to a heart attack. Humphrey is convinced one of the dead man's colleagues murdered him - an unlikely possibility, since they all have alibis. Away from the investigation, the inspector eagerly awaits Martha's return to the island, while JP settles into married life and Dwayne makes an error of judgment while talking to a journalist. Kris Marshall, Josephine Jobert and Danny John-Jules star in the sun-soaked whodunit, with guest appearances from Douglas Hodge, Natasha Little and Sally Bretton(n)

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Father and son Bill and Frankie McAteer are killed in an apparent car accident on their way home from work at Billingsgate Market, but Nikki and Jack arrive to discover the younger man's body is riddled with bullets. Back at the Lyell centre, Clarissa summons her husband Max, a digital forensics expert, to help crack the case - and he uncovers disturbing video evidence showing a sexual encounter between Frankie, his girlfriend Becky and best friend Liam. Crime drama, starring Emilia Fox(n)

programme.title: The House of Eliott
programme.desc: Beatrice receives a surprise visit from her father's mistress and is shocked to learn the truth about her financial difficulties, while Evie begins her first day as an apprentice dressmaker. Period drama, starring Stella Gonet and Louise Lombard(n)

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Harry falls for jazz club owner Jo Beckett and plans to marry her and invest in the club. He even makes preparations to sell his share of CBS to a rival security firm. Michael Elphick stars in this seasonal episode(n)

programme.title: Garden Hopping
programme.desc: Daphne Ledward visits Barton House in the Cotswolds, where the garden is usually devoid of flowers(n)

programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: The House of Eliott
programme.desc: The birth of Tilly's baby brings excitement to the workshop, but Beatrice is still concerned about her own future. Evie accuses Daniel of betraying her trust(n)

programme.title: Soldier, Soldier
programme.desc: Joe competes in a boxing match, with the odds favouring him to win. Meanwhile, Collette sets her heart on a wedding Jo cannot afford(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: New CID recruit DC Suzie Sim makes an impressive debut at Sun Hill by speedily solving a hate crime, but also uncovers alarming evidence that Terry's nephew Bradley could be a victim of abuse. Samantha faces an uphill task convincing her colleagues that Abi has been abducted, while Kerry's uncharacteristic waspishness causes concern and Honey's gossiping about her date with Steve backfires(n)

programme.title: Holby City
programme.desc: Ric turns 50 so the staff throw a surprise party for him - but tensions end up running high and many relationships are put to the test as Jess tries to make Zubin jealous, Tricia attempts to seduce Carlos, and Connie enjoys playing mind games with Will. Meanwhile, Diane can't decide whether to accept Owen's offer, and Chrissie reminds her how unreliable he can be(n)

programme.title: Casualty
programme.desc: Mike and Charlie fly by helicopter to assist the recovery of a youth who has falled from a tree onto a rock face while stealing bird eggs, and apart from his immediate injuries it transpires he has a chronic condition that also requires treatment. Jude's ex-boyfriend is brought in with a serious head injury(n)

programme.title: The Bill
programme.desc: Jim's gambling habit looks like it's about to be exposed when he's spotted at a dog track by Steve and Honey, while Terry arrests his own brother on a trumped-up charge, determined to discover whether he's really abusing his sons. Elsewhere, an act of vandalism at a church leads Tony to a wholly unexpected encounter with another of the Radford boys - has this scion of the notorious crime family really become a man of the cloth?(n)

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Kathy and Rachel set off to meet Wilmott-Brown, the man who raped Kathy(n)

programme.title: Classic EastEnders
programme.desc: Pete is determined to deal out a bit of old fashioned justice to Wilmott-Brown(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Sister Julienne oversees the opening of a family planning clinic at the local community centre, leading mother-of-three Wilma Goddens to start taking the contraceptive pill behind her husband's back. Barbara is distraught when she discovers that her father has accepted a missionary posting in New Guinea for the next three years so will not be able to officiate at her wedding, while Violet suffers terribly with hot flushes, Christopher asks Trixie to meet his daughter, and Delia's heartache may finally be over(n)

programme.title: Call the Midwife
programme.desc: Boxing Day sees heavy snowfall covering the country and the adverse weather causes major disruption across Poplar as roads become blocked and pipes freeze meaning families have to queue outside for water from standpipes. Sister Julienne must inform a family about the death of their loved one and uncovers an uncomfortable truth, while Valerie helps an unmarried couple living in a caravan prepare for their baby, but unforeseen complications knock her confidence in her ability as a midwife. Guest starring Anita Dobson(n)

programme.title: The 39 Steps
programme.desc: Rupert Penry-Jones stars in this adaptation of John Buchan's classic novel, set in 1914. Engineer Richard Hannay is bored and restless in London - until he meets Scudder, who claims to be a British spy. When the agent is killed in his flat, Hannay is thrown headlong into adventure, forced to go on the run under suspicion of murder. Fleeing to Scotland, with police and spies on his tail, he teams up with feisty suffragette Victoria Sinclair, and although they fail to hit it off, the couple become increasingly reliant on each other as they race to unmask a traitor and save Great Britain from German invasion. Action thriller, co-starring Eddie Marsan and Lydia Leonard(n)

programme.title: Last of the Summer Wine
programme.desc: Foggy, Compo and Clegg are put in charge of the annual gala parade, so they visit Auntie Wainwright in the hope of renting a bouncy castle. Festive edition of the rural comedy from 1992, starring Bill Owen, Peter Sallis and Brian Wilde(n)

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: The priest becomes embroiled in an audacious art heist masterminded by his adversary Flambeau, who intends to use Father Brown and his friends to help him settle an old score. Fifties-set crime drama, starring Mark Williams(n)

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The Saint Marie Literary Festival is rocked by the death of a young literature student - and Florence's childhood friend - whose body is discovered at the bottom of a cliff. Suicide seems the likely cause, but as ever Humphrey isn't so keen to jump to conclusions - even with the presence of a note in the victim's bag. But with everyone the dead girl knew at the festival, who could have pushed her over the edge? Away from the investigation, the inspector is busy preparing the shack for Martha's stay. Sun-soaked whodunit, guest starring Fiona Allen, Ramon Tikaram and Monica Dolan(n)

programme.title: New Tricks
programme.desc: Back home in Bermondsey for his youngest daughter's wedding, Gerry is visited by Ralph Paxton, an old friend recently released from prison who wants him investigate the murder of his grandson. Meanwhile, a newly divorced Sasha is forced to work with ex-husband Ned Hancock, Danny puts the body language skills he has acquired on an FBI course to the test, and Gerry's daughter Caitlin gets upset when her father interrogates her fiance about his credentials. Cold case drama, starring Dennis Waterman, Tamzin Outhwaite and Nicholas Lyndhurst, with a guest appearance by David Hayman (Trial & Retribution)(n)

programme.title: Silent Witness
programme.desc: Feature-length episode. Nikki travels to Mexico to attend the funeral of Luisa, a former intern at the Lyell Centre who was murdered in a carjacking in her native country. She soon stumbles across the post-mortem report and realises that the body is not that of her ex-colleague. Assisted by Dr Eva Vasquez and fired up with the idea that Luisa might still be alive, Nikki and Jack trace her last-known movements and are led to a farm where a cartel massacre was carried out. Crime drama, starring Emilia Fox(n)

programme.title: Peppa
programme.desc: There's a spider in the house, so Mami Mochyn tells Dadi Mochyn to get rid of it(n)

programme.title: Cymylaubychain
programme.desc: It's a big day for Bobo, as he learns how to ride(n)

programme.title: Bach a Mawr
programme.desc: It's snowing and time to bring out Big's sledge. However, it remains to be seen whether Small will enjoy the ride(n)

programme.title: Meic y Marchog
programme.desc: The young knight-in-training hears about buried treasure at the end of the rainbow and abandons his promise to help with Sblash's rainbow party(n)

programme.title: Asra
programme.desc: With children from Ysgol ID Hooson, Rhosllannerchrugog(n)

programme.title: Ben a Mali a'u Byd Bach O Hud
programme.desc: Queen Rhiannon reads Ben and Mali a book about a nasty witch, so Magi Hud takes the children to meet a real one who lives in the forest. However, Magi is rude to the witch, who freezes her with magic(n)

programme.title: Jen a Jim Pob Dim
